posts.author: YuvalAp (Yuval Apeloig )
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve got you

We’re hosting a live webinar for our community, all about how to build business apps with monday vibe - no code required.
You’ll get:
A live demo
Practical tips from our team
Q&A with our experts

EU session: Nov 4 - 10:00 AM London / 11:00 AM Berlin / 12:00 PM TLV
Register here: Webinar Registration - Zoom

US session: Nov 4 - 1:00 PM New York / 10:00 AM SF / 8:00 PM TLV
Register here: Webinar Registration - Zoom
